_doc: Criterion 3 pre-registered queries. correct = any top-3 result whose CUT RANGE has IoU >= 0.5 with any gt_range OR start within +/-0.5s of it; for containment_ok anchors (deliberately broad ground truth like 'the speaker at the podium'), a cut range fully inside the gt range also counts. Ground truth labeled by DIRECT media inspection (frames viewed, validated transcript sentence bounds), never by querying the index. All occurrences of a phrase are labeled. Queries for credits/coast are finalized after media download, BEFORE any search against their index. NEGATIVE CONTROLS (gt_ranges == []): nothing in the corpus matches; pass = top-1 scores strictly worse in every space than the loosest true hit among passing positives (data-calibrated floor, printed by the scorer). Authored 2026-07-12 with knowledge of corpus content (required to assert absence) but before ever running them. expected_fail marks pre-registered roadmap gaps: their failure is XFAIL (exit 0); an unexpected pass is strict-XPASS (exit 1, update the spec). Negative-difficulty note: the four negatives are far-concept controls; near-miss negatives (e.g. 'waves on a sandy beach with no rocks') are future work and this suite does NOT yet measure that harder class.

queries.gt_basis: transcript sentence bounds of all three utterances

queries.query: you can't connect the dots looking forward
queries.gt_basis: both sentences stating this idea (297.12 and 306.60)
sentence 'I was diagnosed with cancer.' at [614.20, 616.22]

queries.query: Stanford university logo with a tree
queries.gt_basis: frames viewed: black at f26649 (888.3s), logo at f26723 (890.8s) through end

queries.query: man in black academic robes speaking at a wooden podium
queries.gt_basis: frames viewed: podium shot spans effectively the whole speech; any shot inside counts

full census: all 31 shot rep frames viewed (Claude vision, 2026-07-12); matches = shots 2-3, 12-13, 23, 29 (top-down surf striking brown rock, heavy whitewater); bounds = PySceneDetect shot boundaries. Excluded borderline: shots 8/11 (foam patches, rock only at corner), 20-22 (rocky islet, distant edge break)

queries.query: aerial view of a forested headland with houses, beaches on both sides
queries.gt_basis: full census as Q6; draft query 'aerial drone shot of the coastline' was true for ~37% of timeline (unscorable) -> narrowed to the recurring twin-beach headland location: shots 16, 24, 26. Similar-but-excluded: single-beach vistas (shots 1, 6-7, 15, 17-19, 25, 30), dusk surf lines (5, 10, 28)

queries.query: person filming with a handheld camcorder
queries.gt_basis: authored blind from 12-frame sample BEFORE captions/search; candidates from caption-grep (camera/filming/record) + blind-sample positives, each verified by frame view: shots 3 (camcorder to eye, marble wall), 99 (camcorder raised overhead), 147 (VX to eye, record light). Excluded: shot 30 (smartphone, not camcorder), shot 150 (camera-to-eye in group curb shot - still-vs-video ambiguous at rep-frame resolution). Caption-grep recall was 1/3 on known positives (shots 3, 69 missed) -> visual verification mandatory; 6-shot negative audit found the shot-150 ambiguity, else clean

authored blind as Q8 (wallride seen at shot 69 in blind sample); all caption-grep 'wall' candidates verified NOT wallrides (107 ledge-on-wall-top, 110 flat near wall, 138 stepping over, 223/234 brick-bank carve, 94/96 scenery); single occurrence confirmed

queries.query: tell those men with horses for hearts
queries.gt_basis: lyric row [74.26,79.6] cross-verified by INDEPENDENT ASR (whisper base int8, cold pass on 73.5-80.5s audio slice) -> 'tell us men with horses for hearts' at same offset; two models agree on words+timing. EXPECTED FAIL under current search surface: kind='lyrics' is advisory-only (not embedded) by round-1 design - this query is the pre-registered, measured driver for the round-2 'embed lyrics' decision. Retrieval via the exhaustive contract works today: vindex list --video credits --kind lyrics --range 74:80

the six segmenter noise regions >=2s; their positions coincide with the speech's applause structure (the 16.9s region starts 0.3s after 'Thank you all very much.' ends — the ovation; mid-speech regions follow story beats). Segmenter is upstream of retrieval — same independence argument as whisper sentence bounds for Q1-Q3. THE discriminative audio-class test: applause vs 14 min of speech

queries.query: a dog catching a frisbee in a park
people dancing at an indoor wedding party
underwater coral reef with tropical fish

queries.gt_basis: full visual census (all 31 shots are coastal surf/water) supports waves audible throughout; smoke-level audio-class check — the whole clip is the target, so this verifies the space exists and returns coast audio, not fine discrimination. kinds-restricted to the audio space: an unrestricted query passed via a caption hit, measuring nothing about audio and leaving the audio negative-floor uncalibrated

the one range where singing is INDEPENDENTLY verified (whisper large-v3 and base agree on the lyric words at this offset, 2026-07-12); vocals likely elsewhere too but unverified — containment keeps other true windows from failing the query unfairly. NOTE: near-full-video music bed makes this smoke-level too. MARKED expected_fail after first run: credits is acoustically homogeneous (~90 sibling windows carry the same song), so requiring the single independently-verified window to out-rank its true siblings measures labeling luck, not retrieval; the audio class's discriminative test is A3. Un-xfail when a verified-vocals-complete gt exists
